title: Export is limited to 10,000 connected items at a time, apply items filters or remove mirror columns to export board data
excerpt: I have a fairly large board that I have previously exported to a spreadsheet without an issue. However, yesterday I received the following error: “Export is limited to 10,000 connected items at a time, apply items filter…

posts.author: Scott2 (Scott)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a fairly large board that I have previously exported to a spreadsheet without an issue. However, yesterday I received the following error: “Export is limited to 10,000 connected items at a time, apply items filters or remove mirror columns to export board data.”

Is this a new restriction? I’ve tried hiding all connected/mirror columns and saving to a new view, but it still will not allow me to export.

Any help is appreciated. Thank you.

posts.author: lbloom (Laura Bloom)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Scott, not sure if you ever got this worked out but I ran into the same issue and was able to resolve. I created a view that hides all the connected columns. I then selected all the records by checking the box at the top of the group. I then selected “export” from the pop up window and it worked successfully. Hope this helps you.
